lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in exceptional, showroom-quality condition, reflecting meticulous care and maintenance since new. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep luster and absolutely no scratches, chips, or dents. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery shows no wear, and every electronic feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a complete service history included. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory, offering a tight, quiet, and powerful experience. This is a rare find for a collector or a discerning buyer who demands perfection.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor blemishes, and the interior shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical components are in working order.

Get ready to hit the road with this dependable find! This vehicle is in fair condition and has clearly seen some action, showing some honest wear and tear both inside and out. It remains a reliable performer that's ready for its next chapter, offering a great balance of functionality and value for its next owner!
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear but are well-maintained. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully operational and function as intended.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior is absolutely flawless, showcasing a deep, factory-fresh shine with no scratches, dents, or paint imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, featuring premium materials that show no signs of use and still retain a new-car feel. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having undergone regular professional servicing and thorough inspections. It comes equipped with all high-end features fully functional, including the navigation system, premium audio, and safety assists. This car offers a showroom-quality experience for the most discerning buyer.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, presenting in showroom condition with no discernible imperfections. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine cabin environment, reflects a legacy of meticulous care and uncompromising quality. For the discerning driver seeking a vehicle of rare caliber and peerless presentation, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and staying on top of every little bit of maintenance. It’s practically perfect inside and out. You’ve really gotta see it in person to believe how clean it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’m happy to chat and show you around the car whenever you’re free. Let’s get you behind the wheel of your dream ride!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies to a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission. The high-revving powerplant benefits from a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service, ensuring optimal timing and internal longevity. The chassis is structurally immaculate, featuring proactive subframe reinforcement and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential for superior torque vectoring. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic with exceptional paint depth, the vehicle retains its original suspension geometry and factory-spec bushings for an uncompromised lateral grip profile. A true collector-grade specimen with zero mechanical deficiencies and a pristine undercarriage.
Mint condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Low mileage. Full service records. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly remarkable, showroom-standard specimen that defies its age. This vehicle has been curated with obsessive attention to detail, kept strictly in a climate-controlled environment and never driven in inclement weather. The exterior boasts a deep, swirl-free luster on its original factory paint, while the interior remains in 'time-capsule' condition—the premium leather is supple without a single crease, and the carpets are pristine. Beyond its aesthetic perfection, it is mechanically flawless, featuring a fully documented service pedigree and exceptionally low mileage. Every button, switch, and mechanical component functions with precision. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the definitive example you’ve been searching for.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-grade example, preserved in impeccable condition both mechanically and aesthetically. For the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection, this vehicle offers an unparalleled driving experience without compromise. Meticulously inspected and curated to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for distinction.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail has been preserved to ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled integrity.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she’s a total stunner! This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it’s just waiting for a new owner to take it on an adventure. You won’t find another one this clean anywhere else. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

This 996.2 Carrera represents the pinnacle of the naturally aspirated flat-six era, featuring the refined 3.6L power plant with VarioCam Plus for optimized torque delivery across the rev range. Meticulously maintained, the mechanical integrity is absolute, with a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox delivering power through a precise limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from factory-spec geometry and upgraded Bilstein dampers. With documented service history confirming the IMS bearing retro-fit and zero bore scoring, this example offers a pure, analog driving experience in concours-level condition.
Mint condition. One owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Detailed regularly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom-ready, museum-grade condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage by its sole owner. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with a professional ceramic coating, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the bolsters are firm, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history exclusively through certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage, no history of accidents, and a flawless undercarriage, this vehicle drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. It is a turn-key investment for a discerning collector or an enthusiast seeking the absolute best.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle is offered in mint condition, boasting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies the most rigorous scrutiny. A definitive acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality and an authentic showroom-level experience.

Presented for the discerning collector, this vehicle exemplifies automotive perfection. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, its condition remains indistinguishable from new, offering a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such impeccable caliber. Every detail reflects a legacy of fastidious care, ensuring a driving experience that is as refined as it is exhilarating.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels brand new? I'm parting with this absolute gem and it's in total mint condition! Seriously, it's been babied from day one and looks like it just left the showroom floor. It's super clean, runs perfectly, and is ready for its next adventure. You've gotta see it to believe it—it's a total dream!

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six engine with its high-revving 8,000 RPM redline and precision-tuned individual throttle bodies. This example boasts a reinforced subframe and a meticulously maintained double-VANOS system, ensuring optimal cam timing and torque delivery across the power band. Power is sent through a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission to a GKN variable M-differential. The chassis remains taut with OEM-spec Bilstein suspension and zero bushing deflection. Finished in pristine Laguna Seca Blue over Nappa leather, this vehicle displays no signs of mechanical fatigue or cosmetic wear—a true turn-key masterpiece for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Clean title. All maintenance current. Interior spotless. Paint original.

This vehicle is a pristine 'time capsule' that has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its original showroom aroma; the premium leather upholstery is supple and entirely free of wear, creases, or fading. Every technological feature, from the infotainment system to the safety sensors, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a comprehensive service portfolio.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards of care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to excellence that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Experience the pinnacle of refined engineering and aesthetic preservation in this peerless example.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that defies its pre-owned status. This motorcar exhibits a level of preservation rarely seen, offering the discerning driver a showroom-quality experience. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. For those who demand nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a singular opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to be listing my pride and joy. This car is in truly pristine, mint condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and drives like an absolute dream. You won't find a single blemish on this beauty. I'm looking for a new home for it where it'll be just as loved. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it in person!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3. The S54B32 power unit remains the pinnacle of high-revving, naturally aspirated engineering, featuring individual throttle bodies and a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. This example exhibits zero rod bearing play, and the dual-VANOS system has been proactively overhauled with Beisan components to ensure optimal cam timing.
